question: What are the names of all students who have attended at least one course?
List the id of students who never attends courses?
query: SELECT student_id FROM11 students WHERE student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM student_course_attendance)

question: which course has most number of registered students?
query: SELECT T1.course_name FROM courses AS T1 JOIN student_course_registrations AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_Id GROUP BY T1.course_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
